name: fenrua-web
description: Canonical static Protocol Explorer for fenrua.ai.

scripts.validate: node scripts/require-node24.mjs && node --check kernel-status.js && node --check api/chain-progress.js && node scripts/check-static-links.mjs && node scripts/test-chain-progress.mjs
scripts.deploy:production:node24: node scripts/require-node24.mjs && npx --yes vercel@latest deploy --prod --yes --project fenrua-web
